result:
Fix is in place. The change is unstaged — Patrick can review before committing.

```json
{
  "status": "done",
  "files_changed": ["src/indiestack/routes/components.py"],
  "summary": "Reviewed all 4 route files changed in HEAD~3. pricing.py and purchase.py were deleted. explore.py changes were CSS-only (the 'Clear all' link) — all user-supplied data (q, tag, category name, compat tool name) was already escaped. components.py changes were also CSS-only, and existing escaping of slug/name/tagline/cat_name/maker_name was correct. One genuine pre-existing issue found: `domain` extracted via urlparse().netloc from a tool's user-submitted `website` field was injected unescaped into a src= attribute on line 1206. A malformed URL like `http://evil.com\"><script>` could make netloc contain `\"` and `>`, breaking out of the attribute. Fixed with `escape(domain, quote=True)`. No other missing escapes found."
}
```
